title: deyeuxia quadriseta var. cylindrica
intro: Deyeuxia quadriseta var. cylindrica, also known as Chinese Deyeuxia, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting digestion, as well as possessing antiviral and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Deyeuxia quadriseta var. cylindrica include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments and conditions.
